031426:     function boot() {
031427:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
031428:         bootStarted = true;
031429:         bootStartedAt = Date.now();
031430:         const bootPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
031431:         applyRootAttributes();
031432:         if (installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation()) return;
031433:         createCleanExit();
031434:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031435:         installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031436:         installRadioMessageHook();
031437:         lastObservedCredits = readCurrentCreditTotal();
031438:         installCreditsUpdateHook();
031439:         observeCreditValue();
031440:         installOperationalSuiteShell();
031441:         installCustomVehicleBadges();
031442:         startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt);
031443:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
031444:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
031445:                 economyDeferredDomMutation = true;
031446:                 return;
031447:             }
031448:             let externalMutationFound = false;
031449:             let addedLeafletMarker = false;
031450:             let missionChanged = false;
031451:             let layoutChanged = false;
031452:             let toolkitUiRemoved = false;
031453:             for (const mutation of mutations) {
031454:                 if (mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation)) continue;
031455:                 externalMutationFound = true;
031456:                 if (!addedLeafletMarker && mutationAddsLeafletMarkerIcon(mutation)) {
031457:                     addedLeafletMarker = true;
031458:                     missionChanged = true;
031459:                 }
031460:                 if (!missionChanged && mutationAffectsMissionData(mutation)) missionChanged = true;
031461:                 if (!layoutChanged && mutationAffectsMapLayout(mutation)) layoutChanged = true;
031462:                 if (!toolkitUiRemoved && mutationRemovesToolkitUi(mutation)) toolkitUiRemoved = true;
031463:                 if (addedLeafletMarker && missionChanged && layoutChanged && toolkitUiRemoved) break;
031464:             }
031465:             if (!externalMutationFound) return;
031466:             missionChanged ||= addedLeafletMarker;
031467:             if (!missionChanged && !layoutChanged && !toolkitUiRemoved) return;
031468:             if (addedLeafletMarker) {
031469:                 invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('all');
031470:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031471:                 if (!state.visibility.buildings) scheduleMarkerStateSync(180, true);
031472:             }
031473:             if (layoutChanged) invalidateMapElementCache();
031474:             if (document.hidden || dragState || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031475:             runtimeClearTimeout(mutationTimer);
031476:             const startupSettling = bootStartedAt > 0 && Date.now() - bootStartedAt < STARTUP_SETTLE_WINDOW_MS;
031477:             const mutationDelay = startupSettling
031478:                 ? STARTUP_MUTATION_DEBOUNCE_MS
031479:                 : (state.economyMode ? Math.max(320, DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS) : DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS);
031480:             mutationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031481:                 if (dragState || document.hidden || runtime.destroyed || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031482:                 const panelMissing = settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031483:                 const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
031484:                 const controlMissing = Boolean(mapElement && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
031485:                 if (toolkitUiRemoved || panelMissing || controlMissing) ensureUi();
031486:                 if (mainMutationObserverFallbackActive && (mapElement || document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list'))) {
031487:                     connectMainMutationObserver();
031488:                 }
031489:                 if (layoutChanged) {
031490:                     refreshSuppression();
031491:                     fitControlToMap();
031492:                     schedulePanelPosition(true, 50);
031493:                     scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(60);
031494:                 }
031495:                 if (missionChanged) {
031496:                     scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
031497:                     scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(35);
031498:                     if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(35);
031499:                 }
031500:             }, mutationDelay);
031501:         }));
031502:         mainMutationObserver = observer;
031503:         runtimeListen(document, 'keydown', handleKeyboard);
031504:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerover', handleMissionInspectorPointerOver, true);
031505:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointermove', handleMissionInspectorPointerMove, true);
031506:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerout', handleMissionInspectorPointerOut, true);
031507:         runtimeListen(document, 'pointerdown', () => unlockPayoutAudio(), { once: true, capture: true });
031508:         runtimeListen(document, 'click', event => {
031509:             runtimeSetTimeout(refreshSuppression, 0);
031510:             if (suppressNextOutsideClick) {
031511:                 event.preventDefault();
031512:                 event.stopPropagation();
031513:                 suppressNextOutsideClick = false;
031514:                 return;
031515:             }
031516:             const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
031517:             const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031518:             if (!panel || !panel.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
031519:             if (control && control.contains(event.target)) return;
031520:             if (panel.contains(event.target)) return;
031521:             closePanel();
031522:         }, true);

031269: 
031270:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesMutationRelevant(mutation) {
031271:         if (mutation.type !== 'childList') return false;
031272:         const nodes = [...Array.from(mutation.addedNodes || []), ...Array.from(mutation.removedNodes || [])];
031273:         return nodes.some(node => {
031274:             if (!node || node.nodeType !== 1) return false;
031275:             if (autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot && (node === autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot || node.contains?.(autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot))) return true;
031276:             return Boolean(
031277:                 node.matches?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR) ||
031278:                 node.querySelector?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR) ||
031279:                 node.matches?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR) ||
031280:                 node.querySelector?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR)
031281:             );
031282:         });
031283:     }
031284: 
031285:     function stopAutoLoadAllVehicles() {
031286:         runtimeClearTimeout(autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer);
031287:         autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer = null;
031288:         runtimeUntrackObserver(autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver);
031289:         autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver = null;
031290:         resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031291:     }
031292: 
031293:     function installAutoLoadAllVehicles() {
031294:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles || runtime.destroyed) {
031295:             stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031296:             return false;
031297:         }
031298:         if (!document.body) {
031299:             runtimeListen(document, 'DOMContentLoaded', installAutoLoadAllVehicles, { once: true });
031300:             return false;
031301:         }
031302:         if (!autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver) {
031303:             const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
031304:                 if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return;
031305:                 if (autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot && !autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot.isConnected) {
031306:                     resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
031307:                 }
031308:                 if (autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink && !autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink.isConnected) {
031309:                     releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: false });
031310:                 }
031311:                 if (mutations.some(autoLoadAllVehiclesMutationRelevant)) scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS);
031312:             }));
031313:             observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
031314:             autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver = observer;
031315:         }
031316:         scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(0);
031317:         return true;
031318:     }
031319:

031321:     function startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt) {
031322:         let attempts = 0;
031323:         const runBootAttempt = () => {
031324:             attempts += 1;
031325:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031326:             installRadioMessageHook();
031327:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031328:             observeCreditValue();
031329:             const ready = ensureUi();
031330:             const mapReady = Boolean(getLargestLeafletMap());
031331:             if (ready && (mapReady || attempts >= 12)) {
031332:                 recordStartupMetric('coreUiReadyMs', bootPerformanceStartedAt, { bootAttempts: attempts });
031333:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031334:                 scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup();
031335:                 scheduleVersionStatusCheck(VERSION_STATUS.bootDelayMs, false);
031336:                 runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(connectMainMutationObserver, STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS), STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS);
031337:                 return;
031338:             }
031339:             if (attempts >= 90 || runtime.destroyed) return;
031340:             const delay = attempts < 12 ? 350 : attempts < 30 ? 700 : 1400;
031341:             runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, delay);
031342:         };
031343:         runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, 250);
031344:     }
031345:     function registerBootMaintenanceTasks() {

031660: 
031661:     function scheduleBoot() {
031662:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
031663:         runtimeRunWhenIdle(boot, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS);
031664:     }
031665: 
031666:     if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
031667:         runtimeListen(document, 'DOMContentLoaded', scheduleBoot, { once: true });
031668:     } else {
031669:         scheduleBoot();
031670:     }
031671: })();

000499:     const RUNTIME_KEY = '__MC_MAP_COMMAND_TOOLKIT_RUNTIME__';
000500:     const previousRuntime = pageWindow[RUNTIME_KEY];
000501:     if (previousRuntime?.version === SCRIPT.version && previousRuntime.destroyed !== true) return;
000502:     try { previousRuntime?.destroy?.('replaced by a newer toolkit runtime'); } catch (err) {}
000503:     const runtime = {
000504:         version: SCRIPT.version,
000505:         destroyed: false,
000506:         timeouts: new Set(),
000507:         intervals: new Set(),
000508:         animationFrames: new Set(),
000509:         observers: new Set(),
000510:         waiters: new Set(),
000511:         requests: new Set(),
000512:         fetchControllers: new Set(),
000513:         listeners: [],
000514:         mapBindings: [],
000515:         hookRestorers: [],
000516:         cleanupCallbacks: [],
000517:         destroy(reason = 'runtime shutdown') {
000518:         if (this.destroyed) return;
000519:         this.destroyed = true;
000520:         for (const id of this.timeouts) { try { pageWindow.clearTimeout(id); } catch (err) {} }
000521:         for (const id of this.intervals) { try { pageWindow.clearInterval(id); } catch (err) {} }
000522:         for (const id of this.animationFrames) { try { pageWindow.cancelAnimationFrame(id); } catch (err) {} }
000523:         this.timeouts.clear();
000524:         this.intervals.clear();
000525:         this.animationFrames.clear();
000526:         for (const settle of Array.from(this.waiters)) { try { settle(false); } catch (err) {} }
000527:         this.waiters.clear();
000528:         for (const request of Array.from(this.requests)) { try { request.abort?.(); } catch (err) {} }
000529:         this.requests.clear();
000530:         for (const controller of Array.from(this.fetchControllers)) { try { controller.abort(); } catch (err) {} }
000531:         this.fetchControllers.clear();
000532:         for (const observer of this.observers) { try { observer.disconnect(); } catch (err) {} }
000533:         this.observers.clear();
000534:         for (const { target, type, listener, options } of this.listeners.splice(0)) {
000535:             try { target.removeEventListener(type, listener, options); } catch (err) {}
000536:         }
000537:         for (const binding of this.mapBindings.splice(0)) {
000538:             try { binding.map.off(binding.types, binding.handler); } catch (err) {}
000539:         }

001996:         }
001997: 
001998:         // Fallback for malformed but still recognisable object fragments.
001999:         const parsedPairs = {};
002000:         const pairPattern = /["']?([a-z][\w -]*)["']?\s*:\s*(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)'|([^,}\]]+))/gi;
002001:         let match;
002002:         while ((match = pairPattern.exec(text))) {
002003:         const key = match[1];
002004:         const pairValue = match[2] ?? match[3] ?? match[4] ?? '';
002005:         parsedPairs[key] = pairValue;
002006:         }
002007:         if (Object.keys(parsedPairs).length) {
002008:         const formatted = formatMissingRequirementObject(parsedPairs);
002009:         if (formatted) return formatted;
002010:         }
002011: 
002012:         return text.replace(/^[{\[]+|[}\]]+$/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
002013:     }

002027:     function addStyle(css) {
002028:         const style = document.createElement('style');
002029:         style.id = SCRIPT.styleId;
002030:         style.textContent = css;
002031:         const parent = document.head || document.documentElement;
002032:         if (parent) parent.appendChild(style);
002033:         else document.addEventListener('readystatechange', () => (document.head || document.documentElement)?.appendChild(style), { once: true });
002034:     }

023087:         for (const [doc, context] of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.entries())) {
023088:             if (!activeDocuments.has(doc) || context.root?.isConnected === false) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
023089:         }
023090:     }
023091: 
023092:     function scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(delay = 0) {
023093:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
023094:         runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
023095:         operationalSuiteScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
023096:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
023097:             scanOperationalSuiteShell();
023098:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
023099:     }
023100: 
023101:     function installOperationalSuiteShell() {
023102:         if (operationalSuiteInstalled) {
023103:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
023104:             return;
023105:         }
023106:         operationalSuiteInstalled = true;
023107:         runtime.operationalSuite = Object.freeze({
023108:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE,
023109:             settingsVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
023110:             phase: 'operational-suite',
023111:             schedule: scheduleOperationalSuiteScan,
023112:             contextCount: () => operationalSuiteContexts.size
023113:         });
023114:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
023115:             runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
023116:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
023117:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
023118:             if (runtime.operationalSuite?.phase === 'operational-suite') delete runtime.operationalSuite;
023119:         });
023120:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
023121:     }
023122:

023127:     function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
023128:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
023129:         if (!path) return false;
023130:         try {
023131:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
023132:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
023133:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
023134:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);
023135:             saveState(); updateUI(); showToast('Operational Window setting saved');
023136:         } catch (error) {
023137:             showToast('Operational setting contains invalid JSON');
023138:         }
023139:         return true;
023140:     }
023141: 
023142:     // Issue #391: legacy Mission Requirements Matrix retired; operationalWindow is authoritative.
023143: 
023144:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
023145:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
023146:     }
023147: 
023148:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
023149:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
023150:     }
023151: 
023152:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
023153:         let total = 0;
023154:         let known = 0;
023155:         let unknown = 0;
023156:         let eligible = 0;
023157:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
023158:         const sources = new Map();
023159:         for (const entry of entries) {
023160:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
023161:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
023162:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
023163:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
023164:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
023165:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
023166:             const value = details.value;
023167:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
023168:                 unknown += 1;
023169:                 continue;
023170:             }
023171:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
023172:             known += 1;
023173:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
023174:         }
023175:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
023176:     }
023177: 
023178:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
023179:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
023180:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
023181:     }
023182: 
023183:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
023184:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
023185:     }
023186: 
023187:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
023188:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
023189:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
023190:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
023191:     }
023192: 
023193:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
023194:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
023195:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
023196:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
023197:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
023198:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
023199:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
023200:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
023201:         return `
023202:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
023203:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
023204:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
023205:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
023206:             </div>
023207:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
023208:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
023209:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
023210:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
023211:             </div>
023212:             <span class="mcms-critical-showing">SHOWING ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} OF ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} MISSIONS</span>`;
023213:     }

023215:     function criticalSummaryHtml(allEntries) {
023216:         const baseForStatus = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['status']);
023217:         const baseForOnWay = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['onway']);
023218:         const baseForMyUnits = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['myunits']);
023219:         const statusCounts = { all: baseForStatus.length, attention: 0, 'no-scene': 0, assistance: 0, clearing: 0, 'on-scene': 0, syncing: 0 };
023220:         for (const entry of baseForStatus) {
023221:             const key = criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry);
023222:             if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(statusCounts, key)) statusCounts[key] += 1;
023223:             if (key === 'no-scene' || key === 'assistance') statusCounts.attention += 1;
023224:         }
023225:         let onWayMissions = 0;
023226:         let onWayVehicles = 0;
023227:         for (const entry of baseForOnWay) {
023228:             const count = Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onWay ?? entry?.units?.travelling) || 0);
023229:             if (count > 0) onWayMissions += 1;
023230:             onWayVehicles += count;
023231:         }
023232:         const selectedStatus = selectedCriticalPrimaryStatus();
023233:         const statusCard = (key, className, label, value, title = '') => {
023234:             const active = selectedStatus === key;
023235:             return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter ${className}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-primary-status="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title || `Show ${label} missions`)}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${Number(value).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>`;
023236:         };
023237:         const onWayActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.hasVehiclesOnWay);
023238:         const myUnitsActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.onlyMyUnits);
023239:         return `
023240:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
023241:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>MISSION CONDITION</strong><small>Select one condition</small></div>
023242:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid">
023243:                     ${statusCard('all', 'mcms-summary-aged', 'Any Status', statusCounts.all)}
023244:                     ${statusCard('attention', 'mcms-summary-attention', 'Attention', statusCounts.attention, 'Show missions with no units on scene or detected assistance requirements')}
023245:                     ${statusCard('no-scene', 'mcms-summary-no-scene', 'No Units', statusCounts['no-scene'])}
023246:                     ${statusCard('assistance', 'mcms-summary-assistance', 'Assistance', statusCounts.assistance)}
023247:                     ${statusCard('clearing', 'mcms-summary-clearing', 'Clearing', statusCounts.clearing)}
023248:                     ${statusCard('on-scene', 'mcms-summary-on-scene', 'Stable', statusCounts['on-scene'])}
023249:                 </div>
023250:             </section>
023251:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
023252:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>UNIT SCOPE</strong><small>Optional additional requirements</small></div>
023253:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-condition-grid">
023254:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-enroute${onWayActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="onway" aria-pressed="${onWayActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Require at least one Code 3 vehicle responding"><span>Vehicles On Way</span><strong>${onWayMissions.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><small>${onWayVehicles.toLocaleString('en-GB')} vehicles</small><i aria-hidden="true">${onWayActive ? 023255:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-my-units${myUnitsActive ? 023259:     }

023261:     function nativeMissionCountdownText(missionId) {
023262:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
023263:         if (id === null) return '';
023264:         const node = document.getElementById(`mission_overview_countdown_${id}`)
023265:             || document.querySelector(`#mission_${id} [id^="mission_overview_countdown_"], #mission_${id} .mission_overview_countdown, #mission_${id} .mission-countdown`);
023266:         const text = String(node?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
023267:         return text && !/^[-—]+$/u.test(text) ? text : '';
023268:     }
023269: 
023270:     function formatMissionCountdown(ms) {
023271:         const seconds = Math.max(0, Math.ceil(Number(ms) / 1000));
023272:         const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
023273:         const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
023274:         const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60;
023275:         if (hours > 0) return `${hours}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
023276:         return `${minutes}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
023277:     }
023278: 
023279:     function normaliseMissionTimestampMs(value) {
023280:         const number = Number(value);
023281:         if (!Number.isFinite(number) || number <= 0) return null;
023282:         return number < 100000000000 ? number * 1000 : number;
023283:     }
023284: 
023285:     function missionGameNowMs(snapshot = null) {
023286:         try {
023287:             if (typeof pageWindow.unix_timestamp === 'function') {
023288:                 const value = Number(pageWindow.unix_timestamp());
023289:                 if (Number.isFinite(value) && value > 0) return value < 100000000000 ? value * 1000 : value;
023290:             }
023291:         } catch (err) {}
023292:         const snapshotNow = normaliseMissionTimestampMs(snapshot?.dateNow);
023293:         if (snapshotNow) {
023294:             const capturedAt = normaliseMissionTimestampMs(snapshot?.dateNowUpdatedAt) || normaliseMissionTimestampMs(snapshot?.lastSeen);
023295:             return capturedAt ? snapshotNow + Math.max(0, Date.now() - capturedAt) : snapshotNow;
023296:         }
023297:         return Date.now();
023298:     }
023299: 
023300:     function clearingMissionCountdownText(entry) {
023301:         const nativeText = nativeMissionCountdownText(entry?.missionId);
023302:         if (nativeText) return nativeText;
023303:         const snapshot = entry?.snapshot || liveMissionSnapshots.get(normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId)) || {};
023304:         const target = normaliseMissionTimestampMs(snapshot.dateEndCalc ?? snapshot.dateEnd);
023305:         const now = missionGameNowMs(snapshot);
023306:         if (target && target > now) return formatMissionCountdown(target - now);
023307:         return 'SYNCING';

022719:     function operationalFeatureMissionId(row) {
022720:         return String(row?.dataset?.missionId || row?.id?.match(/mission[_-](\d+)/u)?.[1]
022721:             || operationalQuery(row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')?.href?.match(/\/missions\/(\d+)/u)?.[1] || '');
022722:     }
022723:     function operationalFeatureNumber(node, names) {
022724:         for (const name of names) {
022725:             const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(node?.getAttribute?.(name) ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, ''), 10);
022726:             if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
022727:         }
022728:         return 0;
022729:     }
022730:     function operationalFeatureOwn(node, kind) {
022731:         node?.setAttribute?.(OP_FEATURE_ATTR, kind);
022732:         return node;
022733:     }
022734:     function operationalFeatureRemove(context, prefix = '') {
022735:         const safe = String(prefix).replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/giu, '');
022736:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, safe ? `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}^="${safe}"]` : `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]`).forEach(node => node.remove());
022737:     }

022759:     function operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(panel = operationalQuery(document, `#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) {
022760:         operationalQueryAll(panel, '[data-operational-setting]').forEach(control => {
022761:             const value = operationalFeatureValue(control.dataset.operationalSetting);
022762:             if (control.dataset.operationalType === 'boolean') control.checked = value === true;
022763:             else if (document.activeElement !== control) control.value = control.dataset.operationalType === 'json' ? JSON.stringify(value ?? []) : value ?? '';
022764:         });
022765:     }
022766:     const OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID = 'mcms-operational-feature-style';
022767:     function operationalReplaceContent(node, html) {
022768:         if (!node) return;
022769:         node.replaceChildren();
022770:         const content = String(html ?? '');
022771:         if (content) node.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', content);
022772:     }
022773:     function operationalFeatureStyle(doc) {
022774:         if (operationalQuery(doc, `#${OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID}`)) return;
022775:         const style = doc.createElement('style');
022776:         style.id = OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID;
022777:         style.textContent = `
022778:             [${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]{box-sizing:border-box}.mcms-operational-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:7px 0;padding:7px;border:1px solid rgba(13,110,253,.35);border-radius:9px;background:rgba(13,110,253,.08)}
022779:             .mcms-operational-pill{padding:3px 7px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(13,110,253,.16);font-weight:700;font-size:12px}.mcms-operational-controls{display:inline-flex;gap:3px;margin-left:auto}

022783:         `;

022785:     }
022786:     function operationalFeatureBar(doc, anchor, kind) {
022787:         let bar = operationalQuery(doc, `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}="${kind}"]`);
022788:         if (!bar) {
022789:             bar = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('div'), kind);
022790:             bar.className = 'mcms-operational-bar';
022791:             anchor?.parentNode?.insertBefore(bar, anchor);
022792:         }
022793:         operationalReplaceContent(bar, '');
022794:         return bar;
022795:     }
022796:     function operationalPill(doc, text, kind) {
022797:         const node = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('span'), kind);
022798:         node.className = 'mcms-operational-pill'; node.textContent = text; return node;
022799:     }

022801:     function operationalCallWindowApply(context) {
022802:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.callWindow || {};
022803:         const doc = context.doc;
022804:         const path = String(doc.defaultView?.location?.pathname || '');
022805:         if (!settings.enabled || !/^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(path) || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="extendedCallWindow"]')) {
022806:             operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'call-'); return;
022807:         }
022808:         operationalFeatureStyle(doc);
022809:         operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'call-');
022810:         const anchor = operationalQuery(doc, '#missing_text, #mission_general_info, .mission_general_info, h1');
022811:         if (!anchor) return;
022812:         const bar = operationalFeatureBar(doc, anchor, 'call-toolbar');
022813:         const patients = operationalQueryAll(doc, '#mission_patients .patient,#mission_patients [id^="patient_"],[data-patient-id],.mission_patient');
022814:         const vehicles = operationalQueryAll(doc, '#vehicle_show_table_body_all tr,#occupied tr,#mission_vehicle_driving tbody tr');
022815:         const selected = operationalRequirementsSelectedSnapshot(doc);
022816:         const arr = operationalQueryAll(doc, '[data-aao-id],[data-arr-id],.aao,.alarm-and-response-regulation,.alert-response-regulation,[id^="aao_"]').filter(operationalVisible);
022817:         if (settings.patientSummary) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Patients ${patients.length}`, 'call-patients'));
022818:         if (settings.vehicleCounter) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Vehicles ${vehicles.length}`, 'call-vehicles'));
022819:         if (settings.selectedVehicleCounter || settings.stagingAreaSelectedCounter) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Selected ${selected.length}`, 'call-selected'));
022820:         if (settings.playerCounter) {
022821:             const players = new Set(vehicles.map(row => row.dataset?.userId || row.getAttribute?.('data-user-id')).filter(Boolean));
022822:             bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `Players ${players.size}`, 'call-players'));
022823:         }
022824:         if (settings.arrCounter) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `ARR ${arr.length}`, 'call-arr-count'));
022825:         if (settings.generationDate || settings.alarmTime) {
022826:             const time = operationalQuery(doc, 'time[datetime],[data-generation-date],[data-alarm-time]');
022827:             const raw = time?.getAttribute?.('datetime') || time?.getAttribute?.('data-generation-date') || time?.getAttribute?.('data-alarm-time');
022828:             if (raw) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, `${settings.alarmTime ? 'Alarm' : 'Generated'} ${raw}`, 'call-time'));
022829:         }
022830:         if (settings.collapsiblePatients && patients.length >= Number(settings.collapsiblePatientsMinPatients || 0)) {
022831:             const button = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'call-patient-toggle');
022832:             button.type = 'button'; button.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; button.textContent = 'Toggle patients';
022833:             button.onclick = () => patients.forEach(node => node.classList.toggle('mcms-operational-patient-hidden'));
022834:             bar.appendChild(button);
022835:         }
022836:         const search = (label, rows, kind) => {
022837:             const input = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('input'), kind);
022838:             input.type = 'search'; input.className = 'form-control input-sm'; input.placeholder = label;
022839:             input.oninput = () => {
022840:                 const query = input.value.trim().toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB');
022841:                 rows.forEach(row => { row.hidden = Boolean(query) && !String(row.textContent || '').toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB').includes(query); });
022842:             };
022843:             bar.appendChild(input); return input;
022844:         };
022845:         if (settings.vehicleListPermanentSearch && vehicles.length) search('Search vehicles', vehicles, 'call-vehicle-search');
022846:         if (settings.arrSearch && arr.length) {
022847:             const input = search('Search ARR', arr, 'call-arr-search');
022848:             input.onkeydown = event => {
022849:                 if (event.key !== 'Enter') return;
022850:                 const visible = arr.filter(row => !row.hidden);
022851:                 if (settings.arrSearchSelectOnEnter && visible.length === 1) operationalQuery(visible[0], 'a,button,input')?.click?.();
022852:                 if (settings.arrSearchClearOnEnter) { input.value = ''; input.oninput(); }
022853:             };
022854:             if (settings.arrSearchAutoFocus) runtimeSetTimeout(() => input.focus(), 0);
022855:         }
022856:         if (settings.hideVehicleList) {
022857:             const list = operationalQuery(doc, '#vehicle_show_table_body_all');
022858:             const button = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'call-vehicle-toggle');
022859:             button.type = 'button'; button.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; button.textContent = 'Toggle vehicles';
022860:             button.onclick = () => list?.classList.toggle('mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden'); bar.appendChild(button);
022861:         }
022862:         if (settings.centerMap) {
022863:             const native = operationalQuery(doc, '.map_position_mover,[data-action="center-map"],#map_position');
022864:             if (native) {
022865:                 const button = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('button'), 'call-center-map');
022866:                 button.type = 'button'; button.className = 'btn btn-default btn-sm'; button.textContent = 'Centre map'; button.onclick = () => native.click(); bar.appendChild(button);
022867:             }
022868:         }
022869:         if (settings.vehicleTypeInList) vehicles.forEach(row => {
022870:             if (operationalQuery(row, `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}="call-vehicle-type"]`)) return;
022871:             const type = operationalRequirementsVehicleType(row); if (type < 0) return;
022872:             const badge = operationalPill(doc, `Type ${type}`, 'call-vehicle-type'); (operationalQuery(row, 'td') || row).appendChild(badge);
022873:         });
022874:         if (settings.stickyHeader) operationalQueryAll(doc, '#vehicle_show_table thead').forEach(node => {
022875:             node.style.position = 'sticky'; node.style.top = '0'; node.style.zIndex = '4'; node.dataset.mcmsOperationalSticky = 'true';
022876:         });
022877:         for (const keyword of settings.missionKeywords || []) {
022878:             const text = String(keyword?.keyword || keyword?.text || ''); const title = operationalQuery(doc, 'h1,.mission_title')?.textContent || '';
022879:             if (text && title.toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB').includes(text.toLocaleLowerCase('en-GB'))) bar.appendChild(operationalPill(doc, text, 'call-keyword'));
022880:         }
022881:         if (settings.arrClickHighlight || settings.arrMatchHighlight) {
022882:             const feature = operationalFeatureState(context);
022883:             arr.forEach(row => {
022884:                 if (feature.arrHandlers.has(row)) return;
022885:                 const previous = row.onclick; feature.arrHandlers.set(row, previous);
022886:                 row.onclick = function (event) {
022887:                     previous?.call?.(this, event);
022888:                     if (state.operationalWindow?.callWindow?.arrCounterResetSelection) arr.forEach(item => item.classList.remove('mcms-operational-arr-match'));
022889:                     row.style.setProperty('--mcms-arr-colour', state.operationalWindow?.callWindow?.arrClickHighlightColor || '#008000');
022890:                     row.classList.add('mcms-operational-arr-match');
022891:                 };
022892:             });
022893:         }
022894:     }

022683:     function operationalQuery(root, selector) {
022684:         try { return root?.querySelector?.(selector) || null; } catch (error) { return null; }
022685:     }
022686:     function operationalQueryAll(root, selector) {
022687:         try { return Array.from(root?.querySelectorAll?.(selector) || []); } catch (error) { return []; }
022688:     }
022689:     function operationalEscape(value) {
022690:         return String(value ?? '').replace(/[&<>"']/gu, character => ({
022691:             '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;'
022692:         })[character]);
022693:     }
022694:     function operationalVisible(node) {
022695:         if (!node?.isConnected || node.hidden || node.disabled || node.getAttribute?.('aria-hidden') === 'true') return false;
022696:         try {
022697:             const style = node.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.getComputedStyle?.(node);
022698:             const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect?.();
022699:             return style?.display !== 'none' && style?.visibility !== 'hidden' && (!rect || rect.width > 0 || rect.height > 0);
022700:         } catch (error) { return true; }
022701:     }
022702:     function operationalFeatureState(context) {
022703:         let value = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
022704:         if (!value) {
022705:             value = { transportTokens: new Set(), route: '', arrHandlers: new Map() };
022706:             operationalFeatureContexts.set(context, value);
022707:         }
022708:         return value;
022709:     }
022710:     function operationalFeatureValue(path) {
022711:         return String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean).reduce((value, part) => value?.[part], state.operationalWindow);
022712:     }
022713:     function operationalFeatureSet(path, value) {
022714:         const parts = String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean);
022715:         let target = state.operationalWindow;
022716:         for (const part of parts.slice(0, -1)) target = target[part] ??= {};
022717:         target[parts.at(-1)] = value;
022718:     }
022719:     function operationalFeatureMissionId(row) {
022720:         return String(row?.dataset?.missionId || row?.id?.match(/mission[_-](\d+)/u)?.[1]
022721:             || operationalQuery(row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')?.href?.match(/\/missions\/(\d+)/u)?.[1] || '');
022722:     }
022723:     function operationalFeatureNumber(node, names) {
022724:         for (const name of names) {
022725:             const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(node?.getAttribute?.(name) ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, ''), 10);
022726:             if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
022727:         }
022728:         return 0;
022729:     }
022730:     function operationalFeatureOwn(node, kind) {
022731:         node?.setAttribute?.(OP_FEATURE_ATTR, kind);
022732:         return node;
022733:     }
022734:     function operationalFeatureRemove(context, prefix = '') {
022735:         const safe = String(prefix).replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/giu, '');
022736:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, safe ? `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}^="${safe}"]` : `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]`).forEach(node => node.remove());
022737:     }

022700:         } catch (error) { return true; }
022701:     }
022702:     function operationalFeatureState(context) {
022703:         let value = operationalFeatureContexts.get(context);
022704:         if (!value) {
022705:             value = { transportTokens: new Set(), route: '', arrHandlers: new Map() };
022706:             operationalFeatureContexts.set(context, value);
022707:         }
022708:         return value;
022709:     }
022710:     function operationalFeatureValue(path) {
022711:         return String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean).reduce((value, part) => value?.[part], state.operationalWindow);
022712:     }
022713:     function operationalFeatureSet(path, value) {
022714:         const parts = String(path || '').split('.').filter(Boolean);
022715:         let target = state.operationalWindow;
022716:         for (const part of parts.slice(0, -1)) target = target[part] ??= {};
022717:         target[parts.at(-1)] = value;
022718:     }
022719:     function operationalFeatureMissionId(row) {
022720:         return String(row?.dataset?.missionId || row?.id?.match(/mission[_-](\d+)/u)?.[1]
022721:             || operationalQuery(row, 'a[href*="/missions/"]')?.href?.match(/\/missions\/(\d+)/u)?.[1] || '');
022722:     }
022723:     function operationalFeatureNumber(node, names) {
022724:         for (const name of names) {
022725:             const parsed = Number.parseInt(String(node?.getAttribute?.(name) ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/gu, ''), 10);
022726:             if (Number.isFinite(parsed)) return parsed;
022727:         }
022728:         return 0;
022729:     }
022730:     function operationalFeatureOwn(node, kind) {
022731:         node?.setAttribute?.(OP_FEATURE_ATTR, kind);
022732:         return node;
022733:     }
022734:     function operationalFeatureRemove(context, prefix = '') {
022735:         const safe = String(prefix).replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/giu, '');
022736:         operationalQueryAll(context?.doc, safe ? `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}^="${safe}"]` : `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]`).forEach(node => node.remove());
022737:     }
022738: 
022739:     function operationalWindowSettingsMarkup() {
022740:         const groups = Object.entries(OP_BOOL_KEYS).map(([group, csv]) => `
022741:             <details class="mcms-operational-settings-group" open>
022742:                 <summary>${OP_LABELS[group]}</summary>
022743:                 ${csv.split(',').map(key => `<label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">${operationalEscape(key.replace(/([A-Z])/gu, ' $1').replace(/^./u, value => value.toUpperCase()))}</span><input type="checkbox" data-operational-setting="${group}.${key}" data-operational-type="boolean"></label>`).join('')}
022744:             </details>`).join('');
022745:         const advanced = [
022746:             ['requirements.viewMode', 'Requirements view', 'table,text'],
022747:             ['requirements.sort', 'Requirement sorting', 'requirement,missing,driving,selected,total'],
022748:             ['requirements.sortDir', 'Requirement direction', 'asc,desc'],
022749:             ['missionList.sortMissionsType', 'Mission sorting', ',name,credits,patients,prisoners,time'],
022750:             ['missionList.sortMissionsDirection', 'Mission direction', ',asc,desc']
022751:         ].map(([path, label, values]) => `<label class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">${label}</span><select class="mcms-select" data-operational-setting="${path}" data-operational-type="string">${values.split(',').map(value => `<option value="${value}">${value || 'Default'}</option>`).join('')}</select></label>`).join('');
022752:         const json = [
022753:             'callWindow.tailoredTabs','callWindow.missionKeywords','callWindow.alarmIcons',
022754:             'callWindow.arrCategoryColors','callWindow.selectedVehicleCounterVehicleTypes',
022755:             'missionList.shareMissionTypes','missionList.eventMissions'

022757:         return `<div class="mcms-section-label">Operational Window Suite</div><div class="mcms-status">Toolkit-native operational controls. 022758:     }
022759:     function operationalWindowSyncSettingsUi(panel = operationalQuery(document, `#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) {
022760:         operationalQueryAll(panel, '[data-operational-setting]').forEach(control => {
022761:             const value = operationalFeatureValue(control.dataset.operationalSetting);
022762:             if (control.dataset.operationalType === 'boolean') control.checked = value === true;
022763:             else if (document.activeElement !== control) control.value = control.dataset.operationalType === 'json' ? JSON.stringify(value ?? []) : value ?? '';
022764:         });
022765:     }
022766:     const OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID = 'mcms-operational-feature-style';
022767:     function operationalReplaceContent(node, html) {
022768:         if (!node) return;
022769:         node.replaceChildren();
022770:         const content = String(html ?? '');
022771:         if (content) node.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', content);
022772:     }
022773:     function operationalFeatureStyle(doc) {
022774:         if (operationalQuery(doc, `#${OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID}`)) return;
022775:         const style = doc.createElement('style');
022776:         style.id = OP_FEATURE_STYLE_ID;
022777:         style.textContent = `
022778:             [${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}]{box-sizing:border-box}.mcms-operational-bar{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:7px 0;padding:7px;border:1px solid rgba(13,110,253,.35);border-radius:9px;background:rgba(13,110,253,.08)}
022779:             .mcms-operational-pill{padding:3px 7px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(13,110,253,.16);font-weight:700;font-size:12px}.mcms-operational-controls{display:inline-flex;gap:3px;margin-left:auto}
022780:             .mcms-operational-starred{outline:2px solid #ffc107;outline-offset:-2px}.mcms-operational-collapsed>*:not(a[href*="/missions/"]):not(.mcms-operational-controls){display:none!important}.mcms-operational-patient-hidden,.mcms-operational-vehicle-hidden{display:none!important}
022781:             .mcms-operational-arr-match{outline:2px solid var(--mcms-arr-colour,#008000);outline-offset:1px}.mcms-operational-settings-group{margin:8px 0;padding:7px;border:1px solid rgba(127,127,127,.25);border-radius:8px}.mcms-operational-json-row{display:grid;gap:4px;margin:8px 0}
022782:             @media(max-width:760px){.mcms-operational-bar{padding-left:max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-left));padding-right:max(8px,env(safe-area-inset-right))}.mcms-operational-bar>*{flex:1 1 120px}.mcms-operational-controls{margin-left:0}}
022783:         `;
022784:         (doc.head || doc.documentElement)?.appendChild(style);
022785:     }
022786:     function operationalFeatureBar(doc, anchor, kind) {
022787:         let bar = operationalQuery(doc, `[${OP_FEATURE_ATTR}="${kind}"]`);
022788:         if (!bar) {
022789:             bar = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('div'), kind);
022790:             bar.className = 'mcms-operational-bar';
022791:             anchor?.parentNode?.insertBefore(bar, anchor);
022792:         }
022793:         operationalReplaceContent(bar, '');
022794:         return bar;
022795:     }
022796:     function operationalPill(doc, text, kind) {
022797:         const node = operationalFeatureOwn(doc.createElement('span'), kind);
022798:         node.className = 'mcms-operational-pill'; node.textContent = text; return node;
022799:     }

022801:     function operationalCallWindowApply(context) {
022802:         const settings = state.operationalWindow?.callWindow || {};
022803:         const doc = context.doc;
022804:         const path = String(doc.defaultView?.location?.pathname || '');
022805:         if (!settings.enabled || !/^\/missions\/\d+\/?$/u.test(path) || operationalQuery(doc, '[data-module="extendedCallWindow"]')) {
022806:             operationalFeatureRemove(context, 'call-'); return;

023071: 
023072:     function scanOperationalSuiteShell() {
023073:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
023074:         if (!operationalSuiteEnabled()) {
023075:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
023076:             return;
023077:         }
023078:         const activeDocuments = new Set();
023079:         for (const doc of operationalSuiteDocumentContexts()) {
023080:             const context = operationalSuiteEnsureContext(doc);
023081:             if (!context) continue;
023082:             activeDocuments.add(doc);
023083:             context.generation = ++operationalSuiteRevision;
023084:             operationalRequirementsBindContext(context);
023085:             operationalRequirementsScheduleContext(context, 0);
023086:         }
023087:         for (const [doc, context] of Array.from(operationalSuiteContexts.entries())) {
023088:             if (!activeDocuments.has(doc) || context.root?.isConnected === false) operationalSuiteDisposeContext(context);
023089:         }
023090:     }
023091: 
023092:     function scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(delay = 0) {
023093:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;
023094:         runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
023095:         operationalSuiteScanTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
023096:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
023097:             scanOperationalSuiteShell();
023098:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
023099:     }
023100: 
023101:     function installOperationalSuiteShell() {
023102:         if (operationalSuiteInstalled) {
023103:             if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
023104:             return;
023105:         }
023106:         operationalSuiteInstalled = true;
023107:         runtime.operationalSuite = Object.freeze({
023108:             baseline: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_LSSM_BASELINE,
023109:             settingsVersion: OPERATIONAL_SUITE_SETTINGS_VERSION,
023110:             phase: 'operational-suite',
023111:             schedule: scheduleOperationalSuiteScan,
023112:             contextCount: () => operationalSuiteContexts.size
023113:         });
023114:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
023115:             runtimeClearTimeout(operationalSuiteScanTimer);
023116:             operationalSuiteScanTimer = null;
023117:             clearOperationalSuiteContexts();
023118:             if (runtime.operationalSuite?.phase === 'operational-suite') delete runtime.operationalSuite;
023119:         });
023120:         if (operationalSuiteEnabled()) scheduleOperationalSuiteScan(0);
023121:     }

023127:     function handleOperationalWindowSettingChange(target) {
023128:         const path = target?.dataset?.operationalSetting;
023129:         if (!path) return false;
023130:         try {
023131:             const type = target.dataset.operationalType;
023132:             const value = type === 'boolean' ? target.checked : type === 'json' ? JSON.parse(target.value || '[]') : target.value;
023133:             operationalFeatureSet(path, value);
023134:             state.operationalWindow = normaliseOperationalWindowState(state.operationalWindow, state.operationalWindow?.requirements?.enabled !== false);
023135:             saveState(); updateUI(); showToast('Operational Window setting saved');
023136:         } catch (error) {
023137:             showToast('Operational setting contains invalid JSON');
023138:         }
023139:         return true;
023140:     }
023141: 
023142:     // Issue #391: legacy Mission Requirements Matrix retired; operationalWindow is authoritative.
023143: 
023144:     function criticalMissionValueForEntry(entry) {
023145:         return criticalMissionValueDetails(entry).value;
023146:     }
023147: 
023148:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
023149:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);
023150:     }
023151: 
023152:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
023153:         let total = 0;
023154:         let known = 0;
023155:         let unknown = 0;
023156:         let eligible = 0;
023157:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
023158:         const sources = new Map();
023159:         for (const entry of entries) {
023160:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
023161:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
023162:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
023163:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
023164:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
023165:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
023166:             const value = details.value;
023167:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
023168:                 unknown += 1;
023169:                 continue;
023170:             }
023171:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
023172:             known += 1;
023173:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
023174:         }
023175:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };
023176:     }
023177: 
023178:     function criticalValueDisplay(group) {
023179:         if (!group?.known) return 'UNKNOWN';
023180:         return `≈${formatOperationalCompactCredits(group.total)} CR`;
023181:     }
023182: 
023183:     function criticalValueCoverage(group) {
023184:         return `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} / ${(group.known + group.unknown).toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued`;
023185:     }
023186: 
023187:     function criticalValueTitle(label, group) {
023188:         const knownText = `${group.known.toLocaleString('en-GB')} valued mission${group.known === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
023189:         const unknownText = group.unknown ? ` · ${group.unknown.toLocaleString('en-GB')} value${group.unknown === 1 ? '' : 's'} unavailable` : '';
023190:         return `${label}: approximately ${group.total.toLocaleString('en-GB')} credits from MissionChief average-credit data · ${knownText}${unknownText}`;
023191:     }
023192: 
023193:     function criticalValuesHtml(allEntries, visibleEntries) {
023194:         const scopedEntries = visibleEntries;
023195:         const noScene = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => Boolean(entry?.units?.known) && Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onScene) || 0) === 0);
023196:         const assistance = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries, entry => criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry) === 'assistance');
023197:         const visible = criticalValueGroup(scopedEntries);
023198:         const mode = selectedCriticalValueMode();
023199:         const showingText = `${mode === 'eligible' ? 'Eligible' : 'Total'} MissionChief average credits for ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} currently visible mission${visibleEntries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`;
023200:         const valueCard = (className, label, group) => `<div class="mcms-critical-value-card ${className}" title="${escapeHtml(criticalValueTitle(label, group))}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${escapeHtml(criticalValueDisplay(group))}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(criticalValueCoverage(group))}</small></div>`;
023201:         return `
023202:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-label" title="${escapeHtml(showingText)}"><strong>MISSION</strong><span>VALUE</span></div>
023203:             <div class="mcms-critical-value-mode" role="group" aria-label="Mission value mode">
023204:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="total" class="${mode === 'total' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'total'}">TOTAL</button>
023205:                 <button type="button" data-critical-value-mode="eligible" class="${mode === 'eligible' ? 'mcms-filter-active' : ''}" aria-pressed="${mode === 'eligible'}">ELIGIBLE</button>
023206:             </div>
023207:             <div class="mcms-critical-values-grid">
023208:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-no-scene', 'No Scene', noScene)}
023209:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-assistance', 'Assistance', assistance)}
023210:                 ${valueCard('mcms-value-all', 'Visible Value', visible)}
023211:             </div>
023212:             <span class="mcms-critical-showing">SHOWING ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} OF ${allEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} MISSIONS</span>`;
023213:     }
023214: 
023215:     function criticalSummaryHtml(allEntries) {
023216:         const baseForStatus = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['status']);
023217:         const baseForOnWay = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['onway']);
023218:         const baseForMyUnits = criticalFilterEntries(allEntries, ['myunits']);
023219:         const statusCounts = { all: baseForStatus.length, attention: 0, 'no-scene': 0, assistance: 0, clearing: 0, 'on-scene': 0, syncing: 0 };
023220:         for (const entry of baseForStatus) {
023221:             const key = criticalEntryPrimaryStatus(entry);
023222:             if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(statusCounts, key)) statusCounts[key] += 1;
023223:             if (key === 'no-scene' || key === 'assistance') statusCounts.attention += 1;
023224:         }
023225:         let onWayMissions = 0;
023226:         let onWayVehicles = 0;
023227:         for (const entry of baseForOnWay) {
023228:             const count = Math.max(0, Number(entry?.units?.onWay ?? entry?.units?.travelling) || 0);
023229:             if (count > 0) onWayMissions += 1;
023230:             onWayVehicles += count;
023231:         }
023232:         const selectedStatus = selectedCriticalPrimaryStatus();
023233:         const statusCard = (key, className, label, value, title = '') => {
023234:             const active = selectedStatus === key;
023235:             return `<button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter ${className}${active ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-primary-status="${escapeHtml(key)}" aria-pressed="${active ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="${escapeHtml(title || `Show ${label} missions`)}"><span>${escapeHtml(label)}</span><strong>${Number(value).toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${active ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>`;
023236:         };
023237:         const onWayActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.hasVehiclesOnWay);
023238:         const myUnitsActive = Boolean(state.missionAgeWatch?.onlyMyUnits);
023239:         return `
023240:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
023241:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>MISSION CONDITION</strong><small>Select one condition</small></div>
023242:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-status-grid">
023243:                     ${statusCard('all', 'mcms-summary-aged', 'Any Status', statusCounts.all)}
023244:                     ${statusCard('attention', 'mcms-summary-attention', 'Attention', statusCounts.attention, 'Show missions with no units on scene or detected assistance requirements')}
023245:                     ${statusCard('no-scene', 'mcms-summary-no-scene', 'No Units', statusCounts['no-scene'])}
023246:                     ${statusCard('assistance', 'mcms-summary-assistance', 'Assistance', statusCounts.assistance)}
023247:                     ${statusCard('clearing', 'mcms-summary-clearing', 'Clearing', statusCounts.clearing)}
023248:                     ${statusCard('on-scene', 'mcms-summary-on-scene', 'Stable', statusCounts['on-scene'])}
023249:                 </div>
023250:             </section>
023251:             <section class="mcms-critical-advanced-group">
023252:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-group-head"><strong>UNIT SCOPE</strong><small>Optional additional requirements</small></div>
023253:                 <div class="mcms-critical-advanced-condition-grid">
023254:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-enroute${onWayActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="onway" aria-pressed="${onWayActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Require at least one Code 3 vehicle responding"><span>Vehicles On Way</span><strong>${onWayMissions.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><small>${onWayVehicles.toLocaleString('en-GB')} vehicles</small><i aria-hidden="true">${onWayActive ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>
023255:                     <button type="button" class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-critical-filter mcms-summary-my-units${myUnitsActive ? ' mcms-filter-active' : ''}" data-critical-condition="my-units" aria-pressed="${myUnitsActive ? 'true' : 'false'}" title="Show only missions with one of your units committed"><span>Only My Units</span><strong>${baseForMyUnits.filter(criticalEntryHasMyUnits).length.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong><i aria-hidden="true">${myUnitsActive ? '✓' : ''}</i></button>
023256:                 </div>
023257:             </section>
023258:             ${statusCounts.syncing ? `<div class="mcms-critical-summary-card mcms-summary-syncing" title="Vehicle data is still loading for these missions"><span>Syncing Data</span><strong>${statusCounts.syncing.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</strong></div>` : ''}`;
023259:     }
023260: 
023261:     function nativeMissionCountdownText(missionId) {
023262:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
023263:         if (id === null) return '';
023264:         const node = document.getElementById(`mission_overview_countdown_${id}`)
023265:             || document.querySelector(`#mission_${id} [id^="mission_overview_countdown_"], #mission_${id} .mission_overview_countdown, #mission_${id} .mission-countdown`);
023266:         const text = String(node?.textContent || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
023267:         return text && !/^[-—]+$/u.test(text) ? text : '';
023268:     }
023269: 
023270:     function formatMissionCountdown(ms) {
023271:         const seconds = Math.max(0, Math.ceil(Number(ms) / 1000));
023272:         const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
023273:         const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
023274:         const remainingSeconds = seconds % 60;
023275:         if (hours > 0) return `${hours}:${String(minutes).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
023276:         return `${minutes}:${String(remainingSeconds).padStart(2, '0')}`;
023277:     }
023278: 
023279:     function normaliseMissionTimestampMs(value) {
023280:         const number = Number(value);
023281:         if (!Number.isFinite(number) || number <= 0) return null;

002017:         .forEach(el => el.remove());

002020:         const text = style.textContent || '';
002021:         if (style.id.startsWith('mc-map-command-') || (text.includes('mcms-') && text.includes('data-mc-map-skin'))) {
002022:             style.remove();
002023:         }
002024:         });

002026: 
002027:     function addStyle(css) {
002028:         const style = document.createElement('style');
002029:         style.id = SCRIPT.styleId;
002030:         style.textContent = css;
002031:         const parent = document.head || document.documentElement;
002032:         if (parent) parent.appendChild(style);
002033:         else document.addEventListener('readystatechange', () => (document.head || document.documentElement)?.appendChild(style), { once: true });
002034:     }
002035: 
002036:     let mainStylesInstalled = false;
002037: 
002038:     function installMainStyles() {
002039:         if (mainStylesInstalled && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.styleId)) return;
002040:         const styleStartedAt = startupClock();
002041:         mainStylesInstalled = true;
002042:         addStyle(`
002043:         html[data-mc-map-skin="default"] .leaflet-tile-pane img.leaflet-tile { filter: none !important; }

013763:     // Install presentation rules while the document is still sparse. This avoids a late
013764:     // full-page selector rematch after MissionChief has rendered its map and mission list.
013765:     removeOldInstances();
013766:     try { localStorage.removeItem('mc_map_command_toolkit_attention_v170'); } catch (err) {}
013767:     installMainStyles();
013768:     applyRootAttributes();
013769: 
013770:     function isVisible(el) {
013771:         if (!el || !(el instanceof Element)) return false;
013772:         const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
013773:         if (rect.width <= 0 || rect.height <= 0) return false;
013774:         const style = pageWindow.getComputedStyle(el);
013775:         return style.display !== 'none' && style.visibility !== 'hidden' && Number(style.opacity || 1) !== 0;
013776:     }
013777: 
013778:     function normaliseRegistryValues(registry) {
013779:         if (!registry) return [];
013780:         if (Array.isArray(registry)) return registry;
013781:         try {
013782:         if (typeof registry.values === 'function') return Array.from(registry.values());
013783:         if (typeof registry[Symbol.iterator] === 'function') return Array.from(registry);
013784:         if (typeof registry === 'object') return Object.values(registry);
013785:         } catch (err) {}
013786:         return [];
013787:     }
013788: 
013789:     function getCachedRegistry(globalName, maxAge = MARKER_REGISTRY_CACHE_MS) {
013790:         let registry;
013791:         try { registry = pageWindow[globalName]; } catch (err) { return []; }
013792:         if (!registry) return [];
013793:         const now = Date.now();
013794:         const cached = markerRegistryCache.get(globalName);
013795:         if (cached && cached.registry === registry && now - cached.createdAt <= maxAge) return cached.values;
013796:         const values = normaliseRegistryValues(registry);
013797:         markerRegistryCache.set(globalName, { registry, createdAt: now, values });
013798:         return values;
013799:     }
013800: 
013801:     function invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches(scope = 'all') {
013802:         markerRegistryRevision += 1;
013803:         if (scope === 'all' || scope === 'mission') {
013804:         markerRegistryCache.delete('mission_markers');
013805:         missionIconMarkerCache = new WeakMap();
013806:         missionRegistryRevision += 1;
013807:         missionMarkerIndexCache = { revision: -1, registry: null, markers: [], byId: new Map() };
013808:         }
013809:         if (scope === 'all' || scope === 'vehicle') {
013810:         markerRegistryCache.delete('vehicle_markers');
013811:         vehicleRegistryRevision += 1;
013812:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.vehicleRevision = -1;
013813:         }
013814:         if (scope === 'all' || scope === 'building') {
013815:         markerRegistryCache.delete('building_markers');
013816:         markerRegistryCache.delete('building_markers_cache');
013817:         buildingRegistryRevision += 1;
013818:         personalBuildingIdsCache.createdAt = 0;
013819:         heatmapSourceCache.createdAt = 0;
013820:         }
013821:     }
013822: 
013823:     function currentUserIdCached() {
013824:         const now = Date.now();
013825:         if (cachedUserId !== null || now - cachedUserIdReadAt < 1000) return cachedUserId;
013826:         cachedUserIdReadAt = now;
013827:         try {
013828:         const value = pageWindow.user_id;
013829:         cachedUserId = value === undefined || value === null || value === '' ? null : String(value);
013830:         } catch (err) {
013831:         cachedUserId = null;
013832:         }
013833:         return cachedUserId;
013834:     }
013835: 
013836:     function schedulePanelPosition(useSavedPosition = true, delay = 80) {
013837:         runtimeClearTimeout(panelPositionTimer);
013838:         panelPositionTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => positionPanelOverlay(useSavedPosition), Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
013839:     }
013840: 
013841:     function setInnerHtmlIfChanged(element, html, signature = html) {
013842:         if (!element) return false;
013843:         const nextSignature = String(signature);
013844:         if (element.__mcmsRenderSignature === nextSignature) return false;
013845:         element.__mcmsRenderSignature = nextSignature;
013846:         element.innerHTML = html;
013847:         return true;
013848:     }
013849: 
013850:     function invalidateMapElementCache() {
013851:         cachedMapElementCheckedAt = 0;
013852:         if (cachedMapElement && !cachedMapElement.isConnected) cachedMapElement = null;
013853:     }
013854: 
013855:     function getLargestLeafletMap() {
013856:         const now = Date.now();
013857:         if (cachedMapElement?.isConnected && now - cachedMapElementCheckedAt <= MAP_ELEMENT_CACHE_MS) return cachedMapElement;
013858:         if (cachedMapElement?.isConnected && isVisible(cachedMapElement)) {
013859:         cachedMapElementCheckedAt = now;
013860:         return cachedMapElement;
013861:         }
013862:         const candidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.leaflet-container')).filter(isVisible);
013863:         let largest = null;
013864:         let largestArea = 0;
013865:         for (const candidate of candidates) {
013866:         const rect = candidate.getBoundingClientRect();
013867:         const area = rect.width * rect.height;
013868:         if (area > largestArea) {
013869:             largest = candidate;
013870:             largestArea = area;
013871:         }
013872:         }
013873:         cachedMapElement = largest;
013874:         cachedMapElementCheckedAt = now;
013875:         return largest;
013876:     }
013877: 
013878:     function getViewportMetrics() {
013879:         const viewport = pageWindow.visualViewport;
013880:         const width = Math.max(1, Number(viewport?.width) || Number(pageWindow.innerWidth) || Number(document.documentElement.clientWidth) || 1);
013881:         const height = Math.max(1, Number(viewport?.height) || Number(pageWindow.innerHeight) || Number(document.documentElement.clientHeight) || 1);
013882:         const offsetLeft = Number.isFinite(Number(viewport?.offsetLeft)) ? Number(viewport.offsetLeft) : 0;
013883:         const offsetTop = Number.isFinite(Number(viewport?.offsetTop)) ? Number(viewport.offsetTop) : 0;
013884:         return {
013885:         width,
013886:         height,
013887:         offsetLeft,

===== startup metric / 'toolkitBoot' / hits=0 =====

===== FINAL 350 LINES =====
031322:         let attempts = 0;
031323:         const runBootAttempt = () => {
031324:             attempts += 1;
031325:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031326:             installRadioMessageHook();
031327:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031328:             observeCreditValue();
031329:             const ready = ensureUi();
031330:             const mapReady = Boolean(getLargestLeafletMap());
031331:             if (ready && (mapReady || attempts >= 12)) {
031332:                 recordStartupMetric('coreUiReadyMs', bootPerformanceStartedAt, { bootAttempts: attempts });
031333:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031334:                 scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup();
031335:                 scheduleVersionStatusCheck(VERSION_STATUS.bootDelayMs, false);
031336:                 runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(connectMainMutationObserver, STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS), STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS);
031337:                 return;
031338:             }
031339:             if (attempts >= 90 || runtime.destroyed) return;
031340:             const delay = attempts < 12 ? 350 : attempts < 30 ? 700 : 1400;
031341:             runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, delay);
031342:         };
031343:         runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, 250);
031344:     }
031345:     function registerBootMaintenanceTasks() {
031346:         runtimeRegisterTask('vehicle-data-refresh', VEHICLE_API_REFRESH_MS, () => {
031347:             if (!vehicleDataNeeded()) return;
031348:             installRadioMessageHook();
031349:             return refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
031350:         }, {
031351:             economyIntervalMs: 10 * 60 * 1000,
031352:             economyIntervalResolver: () => operationalUiIsVisible() || document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 2 * 60 * 1000 : 10 * 60 * 1000
031353:         });
031354:         runtimeRegisterTask('auto-night', 60 * 1000, () => runAutoNight(false), { intervalResolver: () => state.autoNight.enabled ? 60 * 1000 : 15 * 60 * 1000, economyIntervalMs: 5 * 60 * 1000, economyIntervalResolver: () => state.autoNight.enabled ? 5 * 60 * 1000 : 30 * 60 * 1000 });
031355:         runtimeRegisterTask('mission-maintenance', FALLBACK_MISSION_REFRESH_MS, () => {
031356:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
031357:                 economyDeferredMapRefresh = true;
031358:                 return;
031359:             }
031360:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031361:             installRadioMessageHook();
031362:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031363:             observeCreditValue();

031367:             if (missionSnapshotsNeeded()) scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh();

031369:             if (criticalDrawer?.classList.contains('mcms-open')) {

031371:                 for (const snapshot of liveMissionSnapshots.values()) {
031372:                     const progress = criticalMissionClearingProgress(snapshot);

031374:                     if (progress && Math.max(0, Number(units?.onScene) || 0) > 0) {
031375:                         hasClearingMission = true;
031376:                         break;
031377:                     }
031378:                 }
031379:                 const refreshInterval = hasClearingMission ? CRITICAL_PROGRESS_REFRESH_ACTIVE_MS : CRITICAL_PROGRESS_REFRESH_IDLE_MS;
031380:                 return refreshMissionProgressFromPage(false, refreshInterval).then(refreshed => {
031381:                     if (!refreshed || document.hidden || !criticalDrawer.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;

031384:                     renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: false, preserveScroll: true });
031385:                 });
031386:             }
031387:         }, {
031388:             economyIntervalMs: 60 * 1000,
031389:             economyIntervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 30 * 1000 : 60 * 1000
031390:         });

031392:             if (document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open')) refreshCriticalClearingCountdowns();
031393:         }, {
031394:             intervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 1000 : 60 * 1000,
031395:             economyIntervalMs: 10000,
031396:             economyIntervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 10000 : 60 * 1000
031397:         });
031398:         runtimeRegisterTask('minute-maintenance', 60 * 1000, () => {
031399:             if (state.missionAge) scheduleMissionAgeRefresh();
031400:             if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh();
031401:             refreshVisibleMissionInspector();
